name: New York Payday Loan
description_short: Online payday loan connector offering $100–$1,000 cash advances with same-day to next-day funding. Also facilitates car title loans up to $35,000 with no credit check.
description_long:
Easy Payday Loans (easypaydayloan.net) is a loan marketplace that connects borrowers with a network of payday and title lenders. The platform operates as a lead aggregator rather than a direct lender, processing applications and forwarding borrower information to lenders in its network for approval decisions. The company was founded to provide a streamlined online application process for consumers facing urgent financial needs.

The platform offers two primary loan products: payday loans ranging from $100 to $1,000 with promised same-day to next-day funding, and car title loans (collateral-based) up to $35,000. Applicants complete a simple online form providing basic personal information, employment details, and vehicle information (for title loans). The platform emphasizes speed and accessibility, stating it accepts "all credit" profiles and performs no hard inquiries for payday loans. Title loans require vehicle details including year, make, model, and mileage.

Easy Payday Loans distinguishes itself through its multi-lender network approach, claiming to connect borrowers with multiple lending options simultaneously. The site advertises 24/7 online access, no application fees, and availability in multiple states including California, Mississippi, and Ohio. It positions itself as an alternative for borrowers with poor credit who may not qualify for traditional personal loans. The platform explicitly disclaims being a lender itself and notes that individual lenders determine final approval, rates, terms, and actual funding timelines.

The company's model carries inherent limitations and risks. As a lead generator, Easy Payday Loans cannot guarantee approval, rates, or funding speeds—outcomes depend entirely on partnered lenders' decisions. Payday loans typically carry high APRs (often 300%+ annually), and the site acknowledges borrowers with lower credit scores face higher rates and fees. The funding timeline disclaimer ("one or more business days") contradicts the "same-day" marketing claims. Borrowers should carefully review individual lender terms, as this platform primarily connects rather than directly lends.
address: 85 Broad St floor 10, New York, NY 10004

company_info.headquarters: 85 Broad St floor 10, New York, NY 10004

pros: No application fees to submit a loan request through the platform
Offers payday loans to borrowers with bad credit or limited credit history
Simple online application requiring only basic personal and employment information
24/7 online access to submit loan applications without time restrictions
Car title loans available up to $35,000 as collateral-based alternative
Multi-lender network allows borrowers to be connected with multiple lending options
Fast processing with potential same-day approval for payday loans
cons: Company is a lead aggregator, not a direct lender—cannot guarantee approval, rates, or terms
Payday loans carry extremely high APRs (typically 300%+) and are unsuitable for long-term borrowing
Funding timeline claims (same-day) are contradicted by disclaimer stating "one or more business days"
Borrowers with poor credit will face significantly higher rates and fees from partnered lenders
Limited loan amounts for payday products ($100–$1,000) inadequate for most emergency expenses
best_for: Borrowers with bad credit seeking quick emergency cash for unexpected bills
Vehicle owners needing larger amounts ($1,000–$35,000) who can use car title as collateral
Consumers requiring funds within 1–2 business days for time-sensitive expenses
Applicants who need a simple online process without extensive documentation or hard credit inquiries
diagnosis: Easy Payday Loans is best for borrowers with poor credit who face genuine short-term emergencies and can qualify through a traditional lender. The critical caveat: this platform is a lead generator, not a lender, so final approval, rates, and terms depend entirely on individual lenders in its network. Payday loans carry triple-digit APRs and should only be used as a last resort for true emergencies, not recurring financial shortfalls.
services: Payday loan applications for $100–$1,000 with same-day to next-day funding
Car title loan connections for $100–$35,000 with vehicle as collateral
Online application form processing (name, email, loan amount, vehicle details)
Multi-lender network matching and lead distribution
Direct deposit funding for approved loans
Vehicle information collection (year, make, model, mileage)
Instant decision processing by connected lenders
Connection to lenders accepting various credit profiles
Responsible lending practices disclosure and privacy policy
